document_summary: Recruitment announcement from the Institute of Journalism and Communication of the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences (CASS), published by the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security. Includes a Wikipedia article about MOHRSS. Serves as source credibility evidence showing the institutional standing and rigor of the journalism/communication field.

snippets.text: The Institute of Journalism and Communication of the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences is a national- level professional institution for journalism and communication research in China. It has also been an education base for cultivating high- end talents in journalism and communication since the reform and opening up. Since its establishment, the Institute of Journalism and Communication has not only been committed to the basic research on the general laws of journalism and communication development and the particular laws of the development of China's journalism and communication industry, but also vigorously carried out policy- oriented consultative research with significant practical significance. It has published a large number of monographs, papers, and research reports, making outstanding contributions to the development of China's journalism and communication industry.
snippets.subject: CASS Institute of Journalism and Communication
snippets.reasoning: National-level institution for journalism research, establishing the prestige of Dehuan Liu's field

snippets.text: Main research directions: Marxist journalism, communication studies, network studies, applied journalism, public opinion studies, and digital media, etc. Main publications: the academic monthly "Journalism and Communication Research", the large annual publication "Journalism Yearbook", "China Journalism and Communication Yearbook", and the annual blue book "China New Media Development Report", "China's Minors Internet Usage Report", etc. Institutional setup: office, six specialized research departments including the Marxist Journalism Department, Communication Studies Department, Network Studies Department, Applied Journalism Department, Digital Media Department, and Public Opinion Studies Department, and an editorial department. There is one affiliated non- physical research center, five research centers under the institute, two laboratories, and two research bases.
snippets.subject: CASS Institute of Journalism and Communication
snippets.reasoning: Research scope of China's top journalism research institute, covering areas relevant to Dehuan Liu's work

snippets.text: Domestic fresh graduates who can graduate on schedule and successfully obtain a doctorate degree certified by the national education authorities. Possess solid professional knowledge and theoretical foundation, high professional quality and potential for scientific research, and have published at least 2 academic papers or one high- quality monograph in China or abroad.
snippets.subject: CASS Institute of Journalism and Communication
snippets.reasoning: High qualification bar for entry-level research positions, showing the selectivity of the field

snippets.text: The Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security of People's Republic of China is a ministry under the State Council of China which is responsible for national labor policies, standards, regulations and managing the national social security. This includes labor force management, labor relationship readjustment, social insurance management and legal construction of labor.[1] The State Bureau of Civil Servants reports to the new ministry.[2][3]
snippets.subject: MOHRSS
snippets.reasoning: Ministry-level government agency overseeing labor policy, establishing credibility of the recruitment announcement
